sentences.target: Ich möchte dich zum Kaffee einladen.

translations.de: Ich möchte dich zum Kaffee einladen.
translations.en: I’d like to invite you for coffee.
translations.es: Me gustaría invitarte a tomar un café.
translations.fr: J'aimerais t'inviter à prendre un café.
translations.it: Vorrei invitarti a prendere un caffè.
translations.ko: 커피 한 잔 하러 같이 가고 싶어요.
translations.ru: Я хочу пригласить тебя на кофе.
translations.pt: Gostaria de te convidar para tomar um café.
translations.vi: Mình muốn mời bạn đi uống cà phê.
translations.ar: أود أن أدعوك إلى فنجান قهوة.
translations.nl: Ik wil je graag uitnodigen voor koffie.
translations.uk: Я хочу запросити тебе на каву.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें कॉफ़ी पर बुलाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Θα ήθελα να σε καλέσω για καφέ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil gjerne invitere deg på kaffe.
translations.id: Aku ingin mengajak kamu minum kopi.
translations.sv: Jag vill gärna bjuda dig på kaffe.
translations.ro: Aș vrea să te invit la o cafea.
translations.cs: Chtěl bych tě pozvat na kávu.
translations.da: Jeg vil gerne invitere dig på kaffe.
translations.ja: 一緒にコーヒーを飲みに行きたいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (1st sg, Konjunktiv II of ‘mögen’) expressing desire; selects the infinitive ‘einladen’ at clause end.
2nd person singular accusative personal pronoun functioning as the direct object of ‘einladen’.
Preposition ‘zu’ contracted with the dative article ‘dem’; heads a dative PP (‘zum Kaffee’) indicating purpose/occasion.
Masculine noun in dative singular as the complement of ‘zum’; denotes the occasion (‘for coffee’).
Lexical verb in infinitive; separable verb (prefix ‘ein’) not split here because it appears as an infinitive governed by a modal.

sentences.target: Wir wollen unsere Nachbarn heute einladen.

translations.de: Wir wollen unsere Nachbarn heute einladen.
translations.en: We want to invite our neighbors today.
translations.es: Hoy queremos invitar a nuestros vecinos.
translations.fr: Nous voulons inviter nos voisins aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi vogliamo invitare i nostri vicini.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天想邀请邻居过来。
translations.yue: 我哋今日想請鄰居過嚟。
translations.ru: Мы хотим сегодня пригласить наших соседей.
translations.pt: Hoje queremos convidar os nossos vizinhos.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להזמין היום את השכנים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi muốn mời hàng xóm đến chơi.
translations.nl: We willen vandaag onze buren uitnodigen.
translations.uk: Ми сьогодні хочемо запросити наших сусідів.
translations.hu: Ma meg akarjuk hívni a szomszédainkat.
translations.hi: हम आज अपने पड़ोसियों को बुलाना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλουμε να καλέσουμε τους γείτονές μας.
translations.nb: I dag vil vi invitere naboene våre.
translations.id: Hari ini kami ingin mengundang tetangga kami.
translations.sv: Idag vill vi bjuda in våra grannar.
translations.ro: Astăzi vrem să-i invităm pe vecinii noștri.
translations.da: I dag vil vi invitere vores naboer.
translations.ja: 今日は近所の人たちを招待したいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Modal auxiliary (1st pl, present) selecting the infinitive ‘einladen’.
Possessive determiner agreeing with the plural noun ‘Nachbarn’; marks the NP as possessed by the subject.
Plural noun in accusative functioning as the direct object of ‘einladen’.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating the time of the intended action.
Infinitive of a separable verb; main lexical predicate chosen by the modal ‘wollen’.

sentences.target: Du kannst Anna und Max einladen.

translations.de: Du kannst Anna und Max einladen.
translations.en: You can invite Anna and Max.
translations.es: Puedes invitar a Anna y a Max.
translations.fr: Tu peux inviter Anna et Max.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以邀请安娜和马克斯。
translations.yue: 你可以邀請安娜同馬克斯。
translations.ru: Ты можешь пригласить Анну и Макса.
translations.he: אתה יכול להזמין את אנה ואת מקס.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể mời Anna và Max.
translations.nl: Je kunt Anna en Max uitnodigen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш запросити Анну і Макса.
translations.hi: तुम अन्ना और मैक्स को बुला सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να καλέσεις την Άννα και τον Μαξ.
translations.nb: Du kan invitere Anna og Max.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengundang Anna dan Max.
translations.sv: Du kan bjuda in Anna och Max.
translations.ro: Poți să îi inviți pe Anna și pe Max.
translations.da: Du kan invitere Anna og Max.
translations.ja: あなたはアンナとマックスを招待できます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Modal auxiliary (2nd sg, present) indicating ability/permission; selects the infinitive ‘einladen’.
Proper noun as the first conjunct in a coordinated direct object NP.
Coordinating conjunction linking the two proper nouns into a single coordinated NP.
Proper noun as the second conjunct; together with ‘Anna’ forms the coordinated accusative direct object.
Infinitive of a separable verb; main lexical predicate selected by the modal ‘kannst’.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern wollen dich zum Geburtstag einladen.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈvɔlən dɪç tsʊm ɡəˈbʊʁtstaːk ˈaɪ̯nlaːdən/

translations.de: Meine Eltern wollen dich zum Geburtstag einladen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈɛltɐn ˈvɔlən dɪç tsʊm ɡəˈbʊʁtstaːk ˈaɪ̯nlaːdən/
translations.en: My parents want to invite you to the birthday.
translations.es: Mis padres quieren invitarte a mi cumpleaños.
translations.fr: Mes parents veulent t'inviter à mon anniversaire.
translations.it: I miei genitori vogliono invitarti al mio compleanno.
translations.ko: 우리 부모님이 너를 내 생일 파티에 초대하고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母想邀请你参加我的生日聚会。
translations.yue: 我父母想請你嚟參加我嘅生日派對。
translations.ru: Мои родители хотят пригласить тебя на мой день рождения.
translations.pt: Os meus pais querem convidar-te para o meu aniversário.
translations.he: ההורים שלי רוצים להזמין אותך ליום ההולדת שלי.
translations.tr: Ailem seni doğum günüme davet etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ mình muốn mời bạn đến sinh nhật của mình.
translations.ar: والداي يريدان دعوتك إلى عيد ميلادي.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders willen je uitnodigen voor mijn verjaardag.
translations.uk: Мої батьки хочуть запросити тебе на мій день народження.
translations.hu: Szüleim meg akarnak hívni a születésnapomra.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता तुम्हें मेरे जन्मदिन पर बुलाना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice chcą cię zaprosić na moje urodziny.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου θέλουν να σε καλέσουν στα γενέθλιά μου.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine vil invitere deg til bursdagen min.
translations.id: Orang tua saya ingin mengundang kamu ke ulang tahun saya.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar vill bjuda in dig till min födelsedag.
translations.ro: Părinții mei vor să te invite la ziua mea.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče tě chtějí pozvat na moje narozeniny.
translations.da: Mine forældre vil invitere dig til min fødselsdag.
translations.ja: 私の両親はあなたを私の誕生日に招待したいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with ‘Eltern’; part of the nominative subject NP.
Plural noun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (3rd pl, present) selecting the infinitive ‘einladen’.
2nd person singular accusative personal pronoun functioning as the direct object.
Preposition ‘zu’ contracted with the dative article ‘dem’; heads a dative PP (‘zum Geburtstag’) indicating occasion.
Masculine noun in dative singular as the complement of ‘zum’; denotes the occasion (‘for (the) birthday’).
Infinitive of a separable verb; main lexical predicate selected by the modal ‘wollen’.

Meine Eltern wollen dich zum Geburtstag einladen.

We want to invite our neighbors today.
You can invite Anna and Max.
My parents want to invite you to the birthday.
